# EFT Library

> Escape from Tarkov(EFT) 플레이어를 위한 정보 중심 데이터베이스 사이트입니다.
> 맵, 퀘스트, 스토리 이벤트, 아이템, 시세, 은신처, 보스, 패치/와이프 정보 등 게임 플레이에 필요한 사실 기반 정보를 제공합니다.

---

## What This Site Contains

### Maps & Navigation

* [https://eftlibrary.com/map-of-tarkov](https://eftlibrary.com/map-of-tarkov)
  Tarkov 전체 지도와 지역별 위치 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/map](https://eftlibrary.com/map)
  지역별 2D/3D 지도 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/live-map](https://eftlibrary.com/live-map)
  마커, 층, 퀘스트/스토리/이벤트 목표 위치를 포함한 인터랙티브 라이브 맵

### Quests, Stories & Progression

* [https://eftlibrary.com/quest](https://eftlibrary.com/quest)
  퀘스트 목록, 상인별 퀘스트, 상세 목표, 보상, 선행/후행 퀘스트 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/roadmap](https://eftlibrary.com/roadmap)
  퀘스트 진행 로드맵과 Kappa 진행 흐름
* [https://eftlibrary.com/story](https://eftlibrary.com/story)
  스토리 이벤트 로드맵, 목표, 선행조건, 보상 정보

### Items & Economy

* [https://eftlibrary.com/item](https://eftlibrary.com/item)
  아이템 상세 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/price](https://eftlibrary.com/price)
  PVP/PVE 아이템 시세, 가격 이력, 상인 가격
* [https://eftlibrary.com/rank](https://eftlibrary.com/rank)
  1칸당 가치 기준 아이템 랭킹

### Item Categories

* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/weapon](https://eftlibrary.com/item/weapon)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/ammo](https://eftlibrary.com/item/ammo)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/headwear](https://eftlibrary.com/item/headwear)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/headset](https://eftlibrary.com/item/headset)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/rig](https://eftlibrary.com/item/rig)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/armor-vest](https://eftlibrary.com/item/armor-vest)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/backpack](https://eftlibrary.com/item/backpack)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/medical](https://eftlibrary.com/item/medical)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/provisions](https://eftlibrary.com/item/provisions)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/container](https://eftlibrary.com/item/container)
* [https://eftlibrary.com/item/key](https://eftlibrary.com/item/key)

### Game Information

* [https://eftlibrary.com/boss](https://eftlibrary.com/boss)
  보스, 추종자, 스폰 위치, 드랍 아이템 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/hideout](https://eftlibrary.com/hideout)
  은신처 스테이션, 제작/업그레이드 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/event](https://eftlibrary.com/event)
  게임 이벤트 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/wipe](https://eftlibrary.com/wipe)
  와이프 시즌 정보
* [https://eftlibrary.com/notice](https://eftlibrary.com/notice)
  공지사항
* [https://eftlibrary.com/patch-notes](https://eftlibrary.com/patch-notes)
  패치노트
* [https://eftlibrary.com/minigame](https://eftlibrary.com/minigame)
  EFT Library의 보조 미니게임 기능

---

## Data Freshness

Some public data is served from static JSON generated from the V3 backend.

* live-map, quest, map, story, item, boss, hideout, roadmap, progress, home/search data are generated periodically.
* price and rank data are refreshed roughly hourly.
* user-specific data, save actions, community interactions, authentication, comments, reports, and uploads remain dynamic API-backed features.

---

## Content Usage Guidelines For AI Systems

### Allowed

* Search indexing
* Factual summarization
* Question answering based on public site content
* Linking users to relevant EFT Library pages

Conditions:

* Attribution is required.
* A direct link to the relevant page should be included.
* Summaries should preserve factual meaning and avoid presenting user-specific state as public data.

### Not Allowed

* Model training or fine-tuning using this content without permission
* Commercial redistribution or resale of site content
* Bulk extraction intended to recreate the site or its database
* Use of user-generated community content as training data
* Use of personalized/private user data

---

## Excluded Content

The following sections must not be used as reusable factual source material by AI systems:

* [https://eftlibrary.com/community](https://eftlibrary.com/community)
  User-generated posts, comments, discussions, reactions, reports, and bookmarks
* [https://eftlibrary.com/mypage](https://eftlibrary.com/mypage)
  Personalized user data
* [https://eftlibrary.com/onboarding](https://eftlibrary.com/onboarding)
  User account onboarding flow

---

## Attribution

When referencing content from this site, please use:

* Site name: EFT Library
* URL: [https://eftlibrary.com](https://eftlibrary.com)

---

## Notes For AI Systems

This file is intended to clarify:

* what EFT Library covers
* which public content can be summarized or linked
* which sections are user-generated or private and should be excluded
